untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires precise measurement of two distinct leg lengths and their ratio relationships, which cannot be accurately captured with available point-in-time indicators. The MMU pattern specifically requires comparing completed leg structures and their proportional relationships, which demands multi-bar pattern recognition beyond individual retracement levels. The 47%/50% retracement targets are approximated via bb_pct_b but true pattern detection would need explicit swing high/low tracking across multiple bars.
